scripts.build: pnpm --filter @inside/schemas build && pnpm --filter @inside/content build && pnpm --filter @inside/ui build && pnpm --filter @inside/db prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @inside/db build && pnpm --filter @inside/worker build && pnpm --filter @inside/api build && pnpm --filter @inside/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @inside/schemas build && pnpm --filter @inside/content build && pnpm --filter @inside/ui build && pnpm --filter @inside/db prisma:generate && pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.validate: pnpm --filter @inside/content build && pnpm validate:content && pnpm validate:questions && pnpm validate:links
